ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "manufacturing_index" INTEGER /* Manufacturing index representing industrial activity */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the state */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the state */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_quality" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state being measured */,
  "so2_level" REAL /* Level of sulfur dioxide in the air */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature for the state */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed for the state */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Total rainfall for the state */,
  "rain_days" INTEGER /* Number of days with recorded rainfall */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity percentage */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for demographics record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the state population */,
  "area_size" REAL /* Total area size of the state in square miles */,
  "urbanization_rate" REAL /* Urbanization rate of the state population */,
  "education_level" REAL /* Education level of the state population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity percentage */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Average atmospheric pressure */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Average visibility in miles */,
  "cloud_coverage" REAL /* Average cloud coverage percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollution_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for pollution source */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of pollution source (e.g., industrial, vehicular) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the pollution source */,
  "emission_level" REAL /* Emission level of the pollution source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollution_sources_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location coordinates or description */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of station installation */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_stations_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, data view) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user submitting feedback */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state related to the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* User comments or observations */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User rating (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for report */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of report generation */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., air quality, climate) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Report data in JSON or CSV format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for system update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of system update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the update (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for map */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "map_data" TEXT /* Map data in GeoJSON or image format */,
  "map_type" TEXT /* Type of map (e.g., heatmap, choropleth) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maps_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
